Source: Claude Docs - Build with Claude
URL: https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/docs/build-with-claude/overview
Fetched: 2026-03-21

# Claude Features Overview

Claude's API surface organized into five key areas:
- Model capabilities, Tools, Tool infrastructure, Context management, Files and assets

## Feature Availability Classifications
- Beta: Preview features for gathering feedback; may change or be discontinued; beta header required
- Generally available (GA): Stable, fully supported, recommended for production
- Deprecated: Functional but no longer recommended; migration path provided
- Retired: No longer available

## 1. Model Capabilities

| Feature | Description | Availability |
|---------|-------------|--------------|
| Context windows | Up to 1M tokens | Claude API, Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure AI (beta) |
| Adaptive thinking | Dynamic reasoning depth; recommended for Opus 4.6; effort parameter | Claude API, Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure AI (beta) |
| Batch processing | 50% cost savings for async bulk requests | Claude API, Bedrock, Vertex AI |
| Citations | Source document grounding with exact references | Claude API, Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure AI (beta) |
| Data residency | Geographic inference controls (global/us) via inference_geo | Claude API only |
| Effort | Control tokens/thoroughness tradeoff; Opus 4.6 and Opus 4.5 | Claude API, Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure AI (beta) |
| Extended thinking | Step-by-step reasoning transparency | Claude API, Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure AI (beta) |
| PDF support | Text and visual content analysis | Claude API, Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure AI (beta) |
| Search results | Natural citations for RAG applications | Claude API, Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure AI (beta) |
| Structured outputs | JSON Schema enforcement; JSON outputs + strict tool use | Claude API, Bedrock, Azure AI (beta) |

## 2. Tools (Server-side)

| Feature | Description | Availability |
|---------|-------------|--------------|
| Code execution | Sandboxed environment; free when used with web search or web fetch | Claude API, Azure AI (beta) |
| Web fetch | Retrieve full content from web pages and PDFs | Claude API, Azure AI (beta) |
| Web search | Augment with real-world data | Claude API, Vertex AI, Azure AI (beta) |

## 3. Tools (Client-side)

| Feature | Description | Availability |
|---------|-------------|--------------|
| Bash | Execute bash commands and scripts | Claude API, Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure AI (beta) |
| Computer use | Screenshots, mouse, keyboard control | Claude API (beta), Bedrock (beta), Vertex AI (beta), Azure AI (beta) |
| Memory | Store and retrieve info across conversations; build knowledge bases | Claude API, Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure AI (beta) |
| Text editor | Create and edit text files | Claude API, Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure AI (beta) |

## 4. Tool Infrastructure

| Feature | Description | Availability |
|---------|-------------|--------------|
| Agent Skills | Pre-built (PowerPoint, Excel, Word, PDF) and custom skills; progressive disclosure | Claude API (beta), Azure AI (beta) |
| Fine-grained tool streaming | Stream tool use parameters without buffering/JSON validation | Claude API, Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure AI (beta) |
| MCP connector | Connect to remote MCP servers from Messages API without separate client | Claude API (beta), Azure AI (beta) |
| Programmatic tool calling | Tools from within code execution containers; reduced latency/tokens | Claude API, Azure AI (beta) |
| Tool search | Scale to thousands of tools with regex-based discovery | Claude API, Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure AI (beta) |

## 5. Context Management

| Feature | Description | Availability |
|---------|-------------|--------------|
| Compaction | Server-side context summarization; auto-summarizes when approaching window limit; Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6 | Claude API (beta), Bedrock (beta), Vertex AI (beta), Azure AI (beta) |
| Context editing | Automatic context management; clears tool results, manages thinking blocks | Claude API (beta), Bedrock (beta), Vertex AI (beta), Azure AI (beta) |
| Automatic prompt caching | Single parameter; auto-caches last cacheable block; moves forward as conversations grow | Claude API, Azure AI (beta) |
| Prompt caching (5m) | Background knowledge and example outputs; 50% cost reduction | Claude API, Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure AI (beta) |
| Prompt caching (1hr) | Extended 1-hour cache for less frequently accessed context | Claude API, Vertex AI, Azure AI (beta) |
| Token counting | Determine token count before sending | Claude API, Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure AI (beta) |

## 6. Files and Assets

| Feature | Description | Availability |
|---------|-------------|--------------|
| Files API | Upload/manage files (PDFs, images, text); no re-upload needed per request | Claude API (beta), Azure AI (beta) |

Note: Models API returns capabilities object (max_input_tokens, max_tokens, capabilities) for programmatic feature discovery.
